case_title: CASTILLO, MARIA vs. OLIVERA, MICHOU et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-18-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-21-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MARIA

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-10-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS IMPOSED. TO FILE POS OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ABRAHAM A FLORES. HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVERA, MICHOU DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-18-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-31-1997

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-10-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS OR SIGNED ORDER TO SERVE BY PUBLICATION. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ABRAHAM A FLORES. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO FILE A STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-25-1997 CONTINUED FROM SEP-10-1997 TO OCT-22-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-22-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-22-1997, SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY TO OBTAIN PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFT COUNSEL TO FILE STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-06-1997 CONTINUED FROM OCT-22-1997 TO DEC-10-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PAY ALL SANCTIONS IMPOSED NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT IF SANCTIONS ARE NOT PAID OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ABRAHAM A FLORES HEARING SET FOR JUL-01-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-19-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION OR DISMISSAL TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ABRAHAM FLORES HEARING SET FOR SEP-30-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-18-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-18-1998, TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE BY PERSONAL OR PUBLICATION TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. RE-UNPAID SANCTIONS ORDER. STATUS STATEMENT TO BE FILE 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ABRAHAM A FLORES, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-02-1998 CONTINUED FROM MAR-18-1998 TO APR-29-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-01-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE HAS NOT BEEN DISMISSED. TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS IMPOSED. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ABRAHAM A FLORES. HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
